an6.91:1.1: “Monks, a person consummate in view1 is incapable of giving rise to six things.
an6.91:1.3: Self-identity view, doubt, grasping at habits & practices, passion that would lead to a lower realm, anger that would lead to a lower realm, delusion that would lead to a lower realm.
an6.91:1.4: “A person consummate in view is incapable of giving rise to these six things.”
